title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.390 - Contracts to be filed with secretary of state
text:
67.390.  Contracts to be filed with secretary of state. — Copies of all cooperative and contractual agreements entered into by state agencies and political subdivisions shall be filed with the agency and a copy shall be filed with the secretary of state.
(L. 1969 H.B. 228 § 7)
